name: Multiple parties in LA AI evidence case—how to sort fault?
description: Court apportions % fault—AI hurts whoever speculated wrong.[1]

mainEntity.name: Multiple parties in LA AI evidence case—how to sort fault?

acceptedAnswer.text: Court apportions % fault—AI hurts whoever speculated wrong.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description:
Comparative fault allocation; AI chats per party discoverable.[1][3] CA pure comparative.

**Key factors:**
- % fault each.
- Joint/several liability.
- AI cross-impeach.

Multi-party lawyer coordinates; strong evidence key.[1] Settle early.
